hero.title: 咖啡冲煮的通用语言
hero.title_en: The Universal Language for Coffee Brewing
hero.subtitle: 一粒种子，为咖啡世界建立数字秩序
hero.subtitle_en: A seed that brings digital order to the world of coffee
hero.description: BrewCode OS is an open-source project building a universal digital language for coffee brewing. Its core asset is an open JSON file format called .brew.

story.title: Genesis
story.ending: You are the world's gift. 欢迎来到 BrewCode OS.

player.name: BrewPlayer
player.desc: Open .brew files, get step-by-step brewing guidance. Works offline. Phone on the scale, glance and go.

repo.name: BrewRepo
repo.desc: Browse community-shared brew recipes. 50 seed recipes covering 20 origins and 6 brewers. Filter and search freely.

forge.name: BrewForge
forge.desc: Visually create and edit .brew files. Form mode for beginners, code mode for geeks. Built-in Schema real-time validation.

community.title: Join Us
community.desc: BrewCode OS is an open project. Standards, tools, recipes—all open source, all collaborating on GitHub.
